title: Shared type: label-namespace helper
description:
Introduce a shared `type:` label-namespace helper and remove the ad-hoc prefix handling (report highest-leverage fix #6).

## Sites
Promote the already-correctly-shaped private helper at `breakdown.rs:602-609` into a shared `const TYPE_NAMESPACE` + `fn type_label_value(&[String]) -> Option<&str>` in `labels.rs`/`domain`, and reuse it across the 5 raw-string sites: `issue.rs:37`, `batch_create.rs:555`, `breakdown.rs:607/619/665`, `validate.rs:607,827` — replacing the raw `starts_with("type:")`/`strip_prefix("type:")` bypasses.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] A single shared helper (`type_label_value` over a `TYPE_NAMESPACE` const) is the only place that knows the `type:` label encoding.
- [ ] All five identified sites call the helper; no `starts_with("type:")` or `strip_prefix("type:")` literal remains outside the helper.
- [ ] Behavior is identical to today for all existing labels (covered by a test on the helper).
- [ ] `cargo-ci` and `code-review` pass.
